title: SQLancer inputs not the same size
poc: CREATE TABLE "sys"."t0" ("c0" CHARACTER LARGE OBJECT NOT NULL,CONSTRAINT "t0_c0_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("c0"),CONSTRAINT "t0_c0_unique" UNIQUE ("c0"),CONSTRAINT "t0_c0_unique" UNIQUE ("c0"));
CREATE TABLE "sys"."t1" ("c0" CHARACTER LARGE OBJECT,"c1" BOOLEAN NOT NULL,CONSTRAINT "t1_c1_unique" UNIQUE ("c1"));
key_bug_features: Mismatched input sizes in SQLancer queries
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE "sys"."t2" ("c0" INTEGER NOT NULL, "c1" VARCHAR(255), "c2" BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE, CONSTRAINT "t2_c0_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("c0"));
CREATE TABLE "sys"."t3" ("c0" FLOAT, "c1" DATE NOT NULL, "c2" CHARACTER VARYING(100), CONSTRAINT "t3_c1_unique" UNIQUE ("c1"));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT t2.c0, t3.c1 FROM t2 LEFT JOIN t3 ON t2.c0 = CAST(t3.c0 AS INTEGER) WHERE t2.c2 IS NOT NULL) AS subquery;
